```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-size:0.7em;color:#2C3E50;margin-bottom:1em;">
  Harness mainly handles <span style="color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">four things</span>:
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.7em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="git-branch" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#3DA18A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">thing 01</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">How to split tasks</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.7em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#C4881A;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">thing 02</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">How to manage state</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.7em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(123,44,191,0.1);">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F3E5F5,#E1BEE7);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#7B2CBF;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="check-check" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#7B2CBF;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">thing 03</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">How to verify key steps</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.7em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);">
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FCEEEC,#FAD9D2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="rotate-ccw" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#D45F47;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">thing 04</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">How to recover from failure</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
